roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT FOR BAIL HRG & ORD RELEASE DEF ON OR/BAIL REDUC FILED

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT AND BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/X: SFSD AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS ADMINISTRATIVELY DISCHARGED,/BWDNC/X: BAIL REMAINS AT$50000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-28-19, D11/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/DOP/INTC/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT NO LONGER BE HELD ON HOME DETENTION, BUT DOES IMPOSE A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 10PM TO 8AM DAILY/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/DOP/INTC/ACM/NTW60/LD:04-02-19/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-13-19/987,2/BAIL:40000/SAORD/SA4:MACYS ON 170 OFARRELL ST,, SF/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TWS/CH1:CJ 61D/CTS:61/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/4019HALF/REMA/INTC/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 07-18-19/CTORD:FINES AND FEES SUSPENDED/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/AMEND:1/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
